hero_subtitle: Connect and coordinate multiple KYC providers into a single compliance operating layer that delivers consistent decisions, audit-ready evidence, and aligned regulatory rules.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle with slow, manual onboarding due to fragmented KYC provider results across multiple systems. This disconnection creates gaps in audit evidence and weakens the ability to deliver consistent, defensible compliance decisions.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY aggregates KYC provider results, normalizes data, routes reviews, creates cases and preserves audit evidence so VASP compliance teams can manage onboarding workflows with greater speed, clarity and defensibility.
workflow_title: From KYC provider checks to decisions
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates KYC provider outputs, applies internal rules, routes reviews, opens cases, preserves evidence and records decisions within one operational workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: More than KYC providers. One compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects multiple KYC provider outputs into a unified workflow that structures decisions, cases, evidence and reporting for clearer operational compliance control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs that require structured orchestration of KYC providers with audit-ready evidence and enterprise-grade deployment for robust compliance operations.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY orchestrate multiple KYC provider outputs
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how KYC provider results route into case workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence is preserved for KYC reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare deployment options for scalable KYC orchestration layers
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides compliance teams with a connected layer above KYC providers, connecting outputs into structured workflows, case management, decision logs and reporting workflows.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY orchestrate KYC provider outputs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY normalizes and aggregates multiple KYC provider results, applies internal rules, routes reviews and creates cases within a single operational workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready KYC evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves detailed KYC decision logs, provider outputs and evidence packages for audit readiness and review within the compliance workflow.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with our existing KYC stack?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects existing KYC providers without requiring replacement, enabling seamless integration and consistent compliance processes.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing KYC providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above KYC providers and other tools, turning their outputs into structured reviews and workflows rather than replacing them.
final_title: Connect KYC provider outputs into audit-ready cases
final_description: Review how SFTY structures multiple KYC providers into controlled onboarding workflows with aligned decisions and evidence packages.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
